title: Sun-dried tomato and feta bread – with store-bought dough

seo.title: Sun-dried tomato and feta bread - with store-bought dough - Marinda Kook

html:
To knead or not to knead? Well sometimes, just sometimes, it's better not to knead! Store-bought dough is so versatile. Over the next few weeks I'm going to show you how you can whip up something quick with store-bought dough without skimping on quality.

YOU'LL NEED

  • 1kg store-bought dough
  • 10 sun-dried tomatoes
  • 2 wheels of feta cheese

NOW:

  1. cut the sun-dried tomatoes into quarters
  2. crumble the feta cheese
  3. knead it through the dough
  4. place in a baking pan that has been sprayed with non-stick spray
  5. let it rise – about 1 hour
  6. bake for 35 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius

Eat with a thick layer of butter until the juices run down your cheeks.

I bought these beautiful paper bread pans for R2.50 each. They make a lovely gift for someone special. Just give it in the little pan as it is.
